sizing_rule.note: Portfolio allocation via optimal f: Position Size (shares) = (Portfolio Total × Optimal Allocation %) / Price Per Share. Example given: 12.787% allocation to Incubeast. Derived from portfolio optimization analysis across multiple investment alternatives.

source_rule_text: Position size is determined by multiplying the portfolio total by the optimal allocation percentage for each investment alternative, then dividing by the instrument price to get share quantity.
